flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Central Baptist College fell 33% between 2021 and 2024 (38.0% → 25.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Central Baptist College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.4k → $21.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Central Baptist College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.4k → $21.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Central Baptist College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (38.9% → 34.1%).
